description: High-level registry for benchmark and external-validation datasets. Adapters live in src/data_adapters/.

nlp4lp.task_type: fixed-catalog schema retrieval + deterministic scalar grounding (LP-structured)
nlp4lp.notes: Canonical EAAI benchmark. Camera-ready tables under results/paper/eaai_camera_ready_tables/.
nlp4lp.license_notes: Gated HF dataset; request access and use HF_TOKEN.

text2zinc.task_type: natural language → MiniZinc (+ data); scalar / model artifacts in HF schema
text2zinc.notes: Adapter + scripts/get_text2zinc.py exist. HF hub dataset skadio/text2zinc is GATED. No new paper metrics claimed until data is staged and an eval harness is defined.
text2zinc.license_notes: CC-BY-4.0 per dataset card; access approval required on Hugging Face.

cp_bench.task_type: constraint modeling / CPMPy reference code (not NLP4LP-style NL queries in sample_test.jsonl)
cp_bench.notes: Registry key cp_bench maps to public DCP-Bench-Open. sample_test.jsonl has id + CPMPy model only (no natural language). NLP4LP pipeline does not apply directly; use for future external validation design.
